raw_consumer_statement:
Spoke to a Representative from American Express name XXXX just now ( XX/XX/year> ). 
Asked her why am I being billed for XXXX? First of all I told her that one I never used the card and I never renewed my membership fee. So she when to check to why I was being charged. She later on, said that it was American Express that was charging me. No charger from any stores we're made. In my head if I did not pay for the membership fee it means that I can no longer use the card to charge with. American Express is asking me to 3 years of membership fee. I never used the card for those 3 years and I never activated my membership fee.
